overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BIDU Daily ETF (BIDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Baidu, Inc. (Nasdaq: BIDU) stock, less fees, and expenses BIDG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
